allow: Bash(python -c "from r2_storage import supabase_storage; print\('Supabase enabled:', supabase_storage.enabled\)")

Bash(python -c "from r2_storage import upload_image; from pathlib import Path; test_dir = Path\('test_temp'\); test_dir.mkdir\(exist_ok=True\); test_file = test_dir / 'test.txt'; test_file.write_text\('Test'\); url = upload_image\(str\(test_file\), 'test'\); print\('Result:', url\); test_file.unlink\(\); test_dir.rmdir\(\)")
